# kernels
```bash
jupyter kernelspec list # 查看
jupyter kernelspec install <kernel-dir> # 安装
jupyter kernelspec remove <kernel-name> # 移除
```

* python: 默认自带`ipykernel`
* c : `jupyter-c-kernel`
```bash
pip install jupyter-c-kernel
install_c_kernel
```
* c++: `xeus-kernel`
```bash
conda install -c conda-forge xeus-cling
```
*
